summary: First-finish smoke verified. Primary bug fix CONFIRMED: POST /api/pos returns 200 with id (no _id leak) using Siyaram-style line items. Same ObjectId fix verified on /api/materials, /api/styles, /api/defects. All 3 Reports endpoints return correct schemas. Both PDF endpoints (invoice + challan) return application/pdf starting with %PDF-1.4. Frontend: Reports nav loads /reports with 3 tabs and data; POs table shows 4 action icons per row; New PO drawer opens with all fields.
passed: POST /api/pos with 10 mixed Siyaram-style line items -> 200, response has id, no _id leak (PRIMARY BUG FIX)
GET /api/reports/cost-variance -> 200, array of 90 rows with all required keys (po_number, client, style_code, computed_cost, po_unit_price, variance, margin_pct, quantity, total_variance)
GET /api/reports/defect-rate -> 200, returns {by_stage, by_type, totals} with expected fields
GET /api/pos/{id}/invoice.pdf -> 200, Content-Type application/pdf, body starts with %PDF-1.4 (3554 bytes)
Sidebar shows 'Reports' nav for admin role
Clicking Reports navigates to /reports without crash and renders all 3 tabs (Cost Variance, Stage Cycle Time, Defect Rate)
POs table shows 4 action icons per row (invoice/challan/view/delete) — confirmed 4 svg icons and 4 buttons/links in first row
New PO drawer opens correctly with PO Number, Client, Line Items, Tax fields, Summary
notes: Created test PO id 6a3e1480cb5250775d5fcd70 (TEST-2220010098, 10 line items, grand total Rs.3,13,920) via API and verified via UI listing. End-to-end POST /api/pos save flow that previously returned 500 'ObjectId object is not iterable' now works correctly.
